I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

input.initialPrompt: I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know how to filter tests by the "Integration" category when running `dotnet test`. Let me look at the test file to see how tests are categorized.

data.content:
The tests use MSTest's `[TestCategory("Integration")]` attribute. You can filter by category with:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will run only the tests marked with `[TestCategory("Integration")]` (e.g., `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase` and `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`).
